data.current_description: Generate a QR code image with the specified data and customization options. Returns an image file in the requested format.

message: Operation 'readQrCodeFromUrl' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description is too brief and lacks critical details about inputs (URL format/requirements), outputs (what data is returned), and error handling. Added specificity about supported image formats, return value structure, and error conditions to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_summary: Read a QR code from a URL
data.current_description: Decode and read the content of a QR code from an image accessible via URL.
data.description_suggestion: Decodes and extracts the content from a QR code image accessible via URL. Accepts a URL parameter pointing to an image file containing a QR code. Returns the decoded data string extracted from the QR code. Supports common image formats (PNG, JPEG, GIF, etc.). Returns an error if the URL is inaccessible or the image does not contain a valid QR code.
data.reasoning: Description is too brief and lacks critical details about inputs (URL format/requirements), outputs (what data is returned), and error handling. Added specificity about supported image formats, return value structure, and error conditions to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_summary: Read a QR code from an uploaded file
data.current_description: Decode and read the content of a QR code from a directly uploaded image file.
data.description_suggestion: Decodes and extracts the content from a QR code image in an uploaded file. Accepts a multipart file upload containing an image with an embedded QR code. Returns the decoded data string extracted from the QR code. Supports common image formats (PNG, JPEG, GIF, BMP, etc.). Returns an error if the file is not a valid image or does not contain a readable QR code.
